headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Underperform on Eversource Energy, Lowers Price Target to $63
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Andrew Weisel   maintains Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) with a Sector Underperform and lowers the price target from $66 to $63.
